import '../styles/about.css' /* ─── About ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Layout: Left column — photo + quick info table Right column — text paragraphs + 3 highlight cards + resume btn ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ /* ---- Edit these values ---- */ const QUICK_INFO = [ { label: 'Name', value: 'Your Full Name' }, { label: 'Email', value: 'yourname@email.com' }, { label: 'Location', value: 'City, Country' }, { label: 'Degree', value: 'B.Tech Computer Science' }, { label: 'Status', value: '✅ Open to Opportunities' }, { label: 'Languages',value: 'English, Hindi' }, ] const HIGHLIGHTS = [ { icon: '🎯', title: 'Goal-Oriented', desc: 'I approach every project with clear objectives and measurable outcomes.', }, { icon: '🛠️', title: 'Practical Builder', desc: 'I prefer real, working code over theory — learning by building real projects.', }, { icon: '📚', title: 'Continuous Learner', desc: 'I dedicate time daily to mastering new tech and refining existing skills.', }, ] /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */ const DownloadIcon = () => ( ) const PlaceholderAvatar = () => ( ) /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */ const About = () => (
About Me

Who I Am

{/* ── Left column ── */}
{/* Photo frame */}
{/* REPLACE the div below with: */}
{/* decorative offset border */}
{/* Quick-info table */}
{QUICK_INFO.map(({ label, value }) => (
{label} {value}
))}
{/* ── Right column ── */}

A Curious Builder & Problem Solver

I'm a Computer Science student with a deep passion for building web applications that are not just functional but intuitive and delightful to use. My journey started with simple HTML pages and has grown into full-stack development with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

I believe great software starts with understanding people. Whether it's crafting a smooth user interface or designing a scalable backend, I focus on writing clean, maintainable code that solves real problems.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source, or reading about system design and software architecture.

{/* Highlight cards */}
{HIGHLIGHTS.map(({ icon, title, desc }) => (
{icon}

{title}

{desc}

))}
{/* Resume download */}
Download Resume
) export default About
